Parramatta, NSW · Fast & honest repairs

What we fix

Expert repairs,
fast turnaround.

Phone Repair

Screen replacements, battery swaps, charging port fixes, water damage recovery — all major brands including Apple and Samsung.

From $49

iPad Repair

Cracked screens, dead batteries, software resets and full hardware repairs for all iPad models and generations.

From $79

Tablet Repair

All Android tablets welcome. Screen, battery, button, and port repairs handled with same-day turnaround where possible.

From $59

Computer Repair

Laptops and desktops — virus removal, SSD upgrades, RAM, OS reinstalls, and full data recovery services.

From $89

Data Recovery

Lost files, failed drives, corrupted storage — we recover photos, documents and data from phones, tablets and computers.

From $130

We Come to You.

Pickup & delivery available across NSW — no need to leave home or the office.

Pre-loved & renewed

Certified-ready iPhones, without the new-phone price tag.

We hand-pick, test, and reset every device — mostly iPhones, with the occasional Android gem. Stock moves fast around Parramatta; tell us your budget and we'll match you to something you'll actually want to keep.

  • Fully erased & reset
  • Battery health checked
  • Charging + cameras tested
  • Warranty on device
  • Local pickup / delivery

About us

Repair people
you can trust.

After 8+ years in the repair industry, we saw too many people being overcharged, misled, or handed back a device that still didn't work properly. That didn't sit right with us.

So WHO BROKiT was built around one idea — keep it honest, keep it affordable, and do the job properly. No upselling. No confusion. Just straightforward repairs from people who actually know what they're doing.

We're not just fixing phones. We're helping people solve everyday tech problems — and making sure they walk away feeling like they got a fair deal.
